Command.name: goto
Command.title: Goto State Button
Command.Description: Prints a button that moves the OS to another state path.

Parameter.name: to
Parameter.description: Child state, parent state using .., or absolute path such as /application/shell.

Parameter.name: icon
Parameter.description: Optional Bootstrap Icons class such as bi-house.

Command.Improve: Make this command stronger like a Unix tool. Add optional behavior as settings rather than creating separate navigation commands.
